name: Bob Casey
subject: match deadline TONIGHT -- don't miss it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b03e/774114257/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
This is important, team: and time is running out. **Our match deadline ends in just a few hours, and we are still $5,800 short of our goal.**

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax plan, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. Big Republican donors have dedicated hundreds of millions of dollars to unseat Democrats just like me this year, and they show no signs of stopping. The president is already actively involved in this race, attacking me on Twitter and promising to campaign "very, very hard" for my opponent right here in Pennsylvania.

I cannot stress how serious this is, team. If we lose Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. My opponent, Congressman Barletta, already votes with the President 99% of the time -- he will continue to rubber-stamp the president's agenda, no matter how damaging it may be to middle-class families here at home.

We need to stop them, and we have to have the resources to do it. **But we only have until midnight to have every gift doubled: Will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180626_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I really appreciate you coming through at this crucial time.

Bob
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180626_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b038/774114257/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b039/774114257/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b03a/774114257/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b03b/774114257/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b1c4/774114257/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6188/51dbcc2a/4a83ea5/3a4b1c5/774114257/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Senator Martin Heinrich
subject: the next Democratic governor of New Mexico?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team,

**I am proud to endorse Michelle Lujan Grisham for governor, not only because of who she is running against but because of who she is running as.**

She is running as a proud Democrat and an even prouder twelfth-generation New Mexican, who has had enough of Gov. Martinez's failed Republican policies. And she is as dedicated as I am to stopping the Trump agenda in its tracks. It is absolutely critical we do everything we can to help Michelle win and turn New Mexico blue - and that includes hitting every fundraising goal.

**Michelle has a major public fundraising deadline in just a few days - and right now her Tea Party opponent has much more cash on hand. Unless grassroots donors like you give to help Michelle hit this goal, we could lose our chance to turn New Mexico blue.

[Please, will you give $5 or more right now to help Michelle raise $15,000 so she can win in November and be the next _Democratic_ governor of New Mexico?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-mexicans-for-michelle-1?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Please+will+you+give+ask+or+more+right+n&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&refcode=heinrich062618")**

[DONATE TO TURN NEW MEXICO BLUE](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-mexicans-for-michelle-1?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+TO+TURN+NEW+MEXICO+BLUE&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&refcode=heinrich062618")
We all have a role to play in creating a better New Mexico. Right now, Michelle's role is to become New Mexico's next governor - she's been earning it for years by fighting every single day for your family. She voted against the GOP tax scam, she's proposed clear and precise plans for future investments in education, and she has always stood firm for your right to health care.

So now, _our_ role is to hit this goal and help Michelle win - and every dollar makes a difference, especially with a public deadline so close. The alternative to raising all $15,000 is unthinkable: Unless we help Michelle at critical moments like this, her opponent, Rep. Steve Pearce, can pull ahead and win this race.

**Pearce already has more money than Michelle does, and has Trump's "full support." Michelle has us. We cannot let her down now - not when she is fighting so hard for us.

[Time is running out for us to team up together to hit this $15,000 goal and elect Michelle. Please give $5 or more right now to help Michelle turn New Mexico blue.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-mexicans-for-michelle-1?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Time+is+running+out+for+us+to+team+up+to&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&refcode=heinrich062618")**

Thank you,

Martin

[Contribute](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-mexicans-for-michelle-1?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180626_1_1&refcode=heinrich062618")

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: The War on the West must end!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | For years, federal government overreach has been an issue in Arizona. Friend, For years, federal government overreach has been an issue in Arizona. Bureaucrats thousands of miles away in Washington, D.C. think that they know more about life in the West than we do. Obviously, they’re wrong. **It’s time for the War on the West to come to an end!** In Congress, I’ll defend Arizona against intrusive federal agencies, and work to get big government out of the way. Friend, can I count on your support? [**Contribute $10, $25, or $50 now!**](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-nejljd-jriylrtihd-y/) More government is the problem - not the solution. Tiffany Shedd

name: Mike Siegel
subject: We can win -- and have three days to show it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS [https://www
body:
http://www.siegelfortexas.org [http://www.siegelfortexas.org]
Don't feel like reading an email today? Donate Now [http://www.siegelfortexas.org/donate/] and keep our campaign strong!
Dear Peter,
We have three days to show the nation what we can do. For the first time since I won the Democratic nomination with 70% of the vote, folks across the country will have a window into our campaign finances. Please donate before the June 30 fundraising deadline [https://www.siegelfortexas.org/donate/index.php?am=20] and help us demonstrate our growing strength.
The polls increasingly show that TX-10 is a flippable seat . Last week, CNN released a poll showing Democrats are up by eight points [https://www.cnn.com/2018/06/20/politics/generic-ballot-june-poll/index.html] nationally over Republicans. This is significant given that TX-10 is a seat built to favor the incumbent by nine points.
And earlier this week, the Texas Tribune released a poll showing that several statewide Democratic candidates are within striking distance [https://www.texastribune.org/2018/06/25/ted-cruz-beto-orourke-poll-5-points-texas-senate-race-uttt/] . This is huge for my campaign. In Texas, voters can vote "straight ticket" without making choices in individual races. Each time a Republican avoids that button, I have the opportunity to pick up another vote -- and take one from my opponent.
Your investment will go directly toward contacting rural and suburban Texans who have been left behind by the Republican party. Give today [https://www.siegelfortexas.org/donate/index.php?am=20] and help us show America that this District will help flip the House in November.
Onward!
Mike
Facebook [http://facebook.com/siegelfortexas] Twitter [http://twitter.com/siegelfortexas] Campaign website [http://www.siegelfortexas.com] ActBlue [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/siegel-for-congress-1]
Donate Now [https://www.siegelfortexas.org/donate]

name: The White House
subject: ‘A moment of profound vindication’
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=06bf7795e35375663657106258b0384a3e4a1f4fa3243be7117d14bb779a0ab51eb293b302a37d404fce8530647ab7afbac48580f7818bf9

The White House - June 27, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump will address members of the Millennial and Gen Z cohorts for a discussion about America's future at the White House.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=06bf7795e3537566cecbfa4dfde83339a4d4f8894859dec8f700af4fbc17bb63ce22952a25a3fed25a43519d140ea892480769f69ff2e93e
Watch live at 12:15 p.m. ET.

'A moment of profound vindication'

Yesterday, the Supreme Court upheld President Trump's travel restrictions and enhanced vetting for a small number of countries that failed to meet a Department of Homeland Security standard for public safety. The 2017 Proclamation cites Chad, Iran, Libya, North Korea, Syria, Venezuela, and Yemen as being inadequate on one or more risk-management factors.

"It is the duty of the government to ensure that those seeking to enter our country will not harm the American people," the Department of Homeland Security said in a statement yesterday. "While we have the most generous immigration system in the world, it has repeatedly been exploited by terrorists and other malicious actors who seek to do us harm."

President Trump called the ruling a "tremendous victory for the American people and for our Constitution" during a meeting with Republican lawmakers yesterday. "This ruling is also a moment of profound vindication following months of hysterical commentary from the media and Democratic politicians," the President added in a statement. "As long as I am President, I will defend the sovereignty, safety, and security of the American People."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=06bf7795e35375665b6a2698a571bf5c6756c6387883a7f5c39490a7b24a8c51e9bd7d9554fb078516ad6c314f5b54bb3203a5219c5ed45f
Read President Trump's statement on yesterday's ruling.

More:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=06bf7795e3537566de0a6006080d280d097f9b0062d2be7c0a84ba912e62d2be6bede22456e5d8dc2e82e889f14ddb09e2f7b7ae29bdbacc
See the facts about the Proclamation on travel restrictions and vetting.

President Trump presents the Medal of Honor

"Today, we tell the story of an incredible hero who defended our nation in World War II, First Lieutenant Garlin Murl Conner," President Trump said from the East Room of the White House yesterday. "Although he died 20 years ago, today he takes his rightful place in the eternal chronicle of American valor."

Lt. Conner came from a farm near Albany, Kentucky. He grew up during the Great Depression and dropped out of school after the 8th grade to help provide for his family. In January of 1945, during the final days of the Battle of the Bulge, Lt. Conner snuck out of a field hospital in Northern France where he was being treated for wounds. He volunteered to go to the front lines—30 yards in front of the American line, in fact—to help direct fire.

"In front of the lone American soldier were six German tanks and hundreds of German soldiers," President Trump said. Lt. Conner "saved so many American lives" that day.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=06bf7795e35375664d0b9f8793bd44ebe344ec8ab8bd92b719d9f1653f71bc0f4f51c76a71e42c95f779c2a6a2a59068df59173a0de1cd3f
Watch President Trump tell Lt. Conner's story as he presents the Medal of Honor.

Photo of the Day

Official White House Photo by Amy Rossetti

President Donald J. Trump presents the Medal of Honor posthumously to United States Army First Lieutenant Garlin Murl Conner
| June 26, 2018

clean_body: 1600 Daily The White House - June 27, 2018 The Day Ahead President Donald J. Trump will address members of the Millennial and Gen Z cohorts for a discussion about America's future at the White House. Watch live at 12:15 p.m. ET. 'A moment of profound vindication' Yesterday, the Supreme Court upheld President Trump's travel restrictions and enhanced vetting for a small number of countries that failed to meet a Department of Homeland Security standard for public safety. The 2017 Proclamation cites Chad, Iran, Libya, North Korea, Syria, Venezuela, and Yemen as being inadequate on one or more risk-management factors. "It is the duty of the government to ensure that those seeking to enter our country will not harm the American people," the Department of Homeland Security said in a statement yesterday. "While we have the most generous immigration system in the world, it has repeatedly been exploited by terrorists and other malicious actors who seek to do us harm." President Trump called the ruling a "tremendous victory for the American people and for our Constitution" during a meeting with Republican lawmakers yesterday. "This ruling is also a moment of profound vindication following months of hysterical commentary from the media and Democratic politicians," the President added in a statement. "As long as I am President, I will defend the sovereignty, safety, and security of the American People." Read President Trump's statement on yesterday's ruling. More: See the facts about the Proclamation on travel restrictions and vetting. President Trump presents the Medal of Honor "Today, we tell the story of an incredible hero who defended our nation in World War II, First Lieutenant Garlin Murl Conner," President Trump said from the East Room of the White House yesterday. "Although he died 20 years ago, today he takes his rightful place in the eternal chronicle of American valor." Lt. Conner came from a farm near Albany, Kentucky. He grew up during the Great Depression and dropped out of school after the 8th grade to help provide for his family. In January of 1945, during the final days of the Battle of the Bulge, Lt. Conner snuck out of a field hospital in Northern France where he was being treated for wounds. He volunteered to go to the front lines—30 yards in front of the American line, in fact—to help direct fire. "In front of the lone American soldier were six German tanks and hundreds of German soldiers," President Trump said. Lt. Conner "saved so many American lives" that day. Watch President Trump tell Lt. Conner's story as he presents the Medal of Honor. Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Amy Rossetti President Donald J. Trump presents the Medal of Honor posthumously to United States Army First Lieutenant Garlin Murl Conner | June 26, 2018

| | Friends,

Last week, I joined Susan B. Anthony List President Marjorie Dannenfelser on EWTN Pro-Life Weekly to discuss my pro-life record in the House and some of the challenges we face in our efforts to defend life at every stage.
As I have said many times, we have an enduring responsibility to do all we can to defend those who cannot yet defend themselves. In Congress, I have been honored to serve as a voice for the voiceless, and I will continue to use my platform to speak out for the protection of life.
I am grateful to have the [endorsement and strong support of SBA List](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=109A131A9A3750) in my campaign for reelection in Alabama's Second District.

Watch and share our feature on EWTN Pro-Life Weekly [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=109A131A9A3751).

\- Martha

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: 🚆 Join me in putting Florida on track
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgrTBDi_sopEN99jrsRcRdhkPISwZv_XWXi_nIhPV3k=/bMnznHfqcEnj6ygGu8NOxljk1mFDllazVEEJP9RalZc=) Friends and Neighbors -- Whether it's getting from home to work or from the Everglades to Miami, transportation is an essential element of our lives and livelihoods here in Florida. Yet, all too often, commuting Floridians face frustrating delays, particularly on our highways and our existing rail systems. This is where high speed rail comes in. A high speed rail system in Florida could cut commuting and travel times in half and make the overall quality and safety of this method of transportation significantly stronger. During my time in the Legislature, I introduced legislation to help bring high speed rail to Florida. Unfortunately, Governor Scott, promptly vetoed it. But like clockwork, now that he is running for U.S. Senate, he is all in for high speed rail. Go figure. **As your next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), I want to fix this.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgrTBDi_sopEN99jrsRcRdhkPISwZv_XWXi_nIhPV3k=/8-TqBFjh6LeZSKhlamwLuMX1RQ_79xclJGK_3gUacFU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help Jeremy Put Florida on Track. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgrTBDi_sopEN99jrsRcRdhkPISwZv_XWXi_nIhPV3k=/8-TqBFjh6LeZSKhlamwLuMX1RQ_79xclJGK_3gUacFU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) While the governor still sits at the helm of Florida government, the CFO serves as a significant check and balance to their power. As your next CFO, I would work tirelessly to make sure your hard earned tax dollars are being spent efficiently - and invested in items and programs that actually enrich life here in the Sunshine State, such as high speed rail. I would fiercely advocate for an innovation centered economy that puts Florida on track for an innovative future. But I have an election to win first - and a crucial end of month fundraising deadline to meet. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more before midnight Saturday, to join me in putting Florida on track to an innovative future - with an innovation centered economy?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HgrTBDi_sopEN99jrsRcRdhkPISwZv_XWXi_nIhPV3k=/8-TqBFjh6LeZSKhlamwLuMX1RQ_79xclJGK_3gUacFU=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

subject: FW: laser focused

body:
Hi friend,
Did you see the Governor's note? **This is it. The _FINAL_ quarterly fundraising deadline before the Democratic Primary is in THREE DAYS.**
Gina has our backs. Let's show her that we have hers -- **[donate $23 today, before the end of quarter!!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c7/5e076a9e/542bebde/14426195/3266415141/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180627")**
Thank you, friend.
Kate
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director
**PS:[Will you show Gina Raimondo how much support she has by donating $23 right now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c7/5e076a9e/542bebde/14426195/3266415141/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180627")**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: gina.raimondo (gmr@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: Tue, Jun 26, 2018 at 8:28 AM
Subject: laser focused
Hi friend,
**Every Rhode Islander should be able to keep up and get ahead** \-- on this we can all agree. Your zip code should not determine the quality of your education, your gender should not dictate how much money you make, and the color of your skin should not influence your job prospects.
**That 's why I've been laser focused on expanding opportunity for everyone throughout this first term.** I'm proud to be Rhode Island's only Governor to propose three consecutive minimum wage raises. I lifted the freeze on school construction and began rebuilding our schools, made community college tuition-free, and started fixing our roads and bridges -- creating thousands of good jobs in the process.
Together we have accomplished a lot, but not everyone is feeling our comeback yet. **There 's so much more to do, and I need your help to do it: [Click here to donate $21 or as much as you can, right now.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c7/5e076a9e/542bebde/14426195/3266415141/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180627")**
Many thanks,
Gina
**PS: The end-of-quarter deadline for donations is this Saturday. [Will you donate now to help us meet our goal?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0c7/5e076a9e/542bebde/14426195/3266415141/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180627")**

name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: the path to taking back Congress runs through PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6189/51dbcc2a/4ae87f4/3a4b137/2411417726/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team --

Republicans hold the majority in both houses of Congress, and if we want to have any chance of winning it back, we need to step up.

[**_In order to win the Senate majority, we need to protect every single Democrat up for re-election in 2018. Can you donate $5 or more today to defend Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat and support Bob Casey?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-deadline?refcode=em_20180627_fr1_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

You've heard it over and over again: _Democrats can win back Congress in the 2018 midterms_. Pennsylvania is the key to making that happen. The Supreme Court's recent gerrymandering decision put solid red seats up for grabs for the first time in years, seats that could be _one-quarter_ of the total Democrats need to flip the House.

But it doesn't stop there. Republicans still have the Senate, and Democratic seats -- ones just like Pennsylvania's -- are at risk. Republicans know that their majority is slim, and they are doing all they can do to flip Democratic seats this year.

**The road to winning back the majority in Congress runs right through Pennsylvania. Can you donate $5 -- whatever you can give -- to protect Bob Casey and keep Pennsylvania blue?**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. subject: Why I’m running

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AB6jbBTgz_ozlG0qu1HFs7WFrFaqidF-KMMHO4cGGUs=/VJvWv6chRBEpL8UqIiJxfLGWnaeLnkjz92VXFP2Kuqg=?refcode=em180627)

Friend,

As a minister and as a CEO, I've always tried to dedicate myself to improving the lives of those around me. Now, I'm running for Congress to improve our communities and make it easier for hardworking people to succeed.

Now more than ever, we need accountability and integrity in Washington. That's what I'll bring to Congress -- but I can't do it without your support.

[**On Saturday, we face a major FEC fundraising deadline and what we raise will show the strength of our campaign. Chip in $5 now to show you 're with me before Saturday's big deadline.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AB6jbBTgz_ozlG0qu1HFs7WFrFaqidF-KMMHO4cGGUs=/VJvWv6chRBEpL8UqIiJxfLGWnaeLnkjz92VXFP2Kuqg=?refcode=em180627)

I'm running to improve and expand access to health care for all Americans.

I'm running to create good-paying jobs with equal pay and strong benefits for everyone.

And I'm running to be a champion for accountability and transparency in Congress.

**We have a chance to flip Indiana 's second congressional district blue -- but it all depends on whether we have the resources we need to build a winning campaign. Please contribute before Saturday's deadline to flip this seat:**

name: Tom Perez
subject: Elections have consequences and this is a huge consequence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
These Supreme Court decisions are only happening because Republicans stole a Supreme Court seat from President Obama.
---
This morning the Supreme Court's conservative majority handed down an awful decision, siding with corporations over working families by making it harder for unions to organize nationwide. This decision is merely the latest terrible ruling the high court has handed down in the last few weeks:
* Upholding Trump's Muslim ban.
* Allowing Ohio to keep purging voters from its rolls, creating a blueprint for other Republican-led states across the country to suppress voters.
* Reversing a lower court ruling that found that several Texas congressional and legislative districts were racially gerrymandered.
* Ruling against a California law that prevents anti-choice "crisis pregnancy centers" from misleading women.
* Limiting the ability of millions of workers to join together and challenge their employers on everything from wage disputes to discrimination to sexual harassment claims.

**All of these decisions were decided by a 5-4 vote --_and they only happened because Republicans stole a Supreme Court seat from President Obama._**

These rulings are proof, Derek: _Elections matter._

We weren't able to confirm Merrick Garland, President Obama's nominee to the Supreme Court in 2016, because Republicans held a majority in the Senate and refused to even give Judge Garland a hearing. They kept that seat vacant for a whole year because they knew it was the swing vote on the high court. Then they elected a Republican president, and a Republican Senate majority confirmed Neil Gorsuch.

If we don't do everything in our power to flip the Senate in 2018, and the White House in 2020, Donald Trump could appoint even more Supreme Court justices -- and as a lawyer, let me tell you: that would be absolutely catastrophic for our country.

**There couldn't be a more important time to step up and help Democrats win up and down the ballot this year -- chip in $3 for the first time this year today.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc516/3707288284/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/janus-decision?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc517/3707288284/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/janus-decision?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc514/3707288284/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/janus-decision?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc515/3707288284/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/janus-decision?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc512/3707288284/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/janus-decision?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc513/3707288284/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/janus-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")
** This is all a part of the Republican playbook, Derek. They have been on a decades-long mission to make it harder to vote and undermine the labor movement -- and they've largely been pursuing this agenda through the courts. The worst part: _Republicans are good at this._ They know how important the judiciary is, and they get out to vote in each and every election because they know just how much is at stake.

They want to make it harder for people to vote, harder for people to organize, and harder for people to make their voices heard -- all because they know that's the only way they can win. We have to fight back -- and we have to fight back now:

**[This Supreme Court decision is another blow to our democracy, but we can't waste time hanging our heads. Chip in $3 right now to give Democrats resources to organize and win across the nation this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc510/3707288284/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/janus-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+This+Supreme+Court+decision+is+another+b&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")**

Thanks for your support,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. It's pretty straightforward: When Democrats get out and vote, we elect leaders and appoint judges who stand up for working families. When we don't, we give Republicans the opportunity to build a power structure that could exist for decades to come. **[Donate $3 now to fight back.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc511/3707288284/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/janus-decision?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc51e/3707288284/VEsFBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc51f/3707288284/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc51c/3707288284/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp2_s3"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521278/4067b0a/65bfa81ee/7fbfc51d/3707288284/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp2_s3&source=em_20180627_tp2_s3"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The results are in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b984b/4138108340/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06268B") Friend, I am proud to be writing you as your Democratic nominee for governor of Maryland. I am the son of two teachers who were civil rights workers -- one an African American woman who grew up in the McCulloh Homes housing project in West Baltimore and who traces her roots to a slave turned statesman in Virginia; the other a white man whose family from New England fought and bled in the Revolutionary War. My parents left our state because their interracial marriage was against the law in Maryland in 1966. We have come a long way since those days, and a long way in this campaign. Yesterday we came together from all corners of Maryland to send a message to the Republican administration in Annapolis: **Your time in power is coming to an end.** Now voters in Maryland face a clear-cut choice: Larry Hogan's brand of "go along to get along" leadership, or a progressive future that makes Maryland greener, stronger, and more equal. **It's been a long primary, but we have to turn to the general election right away -- Larry Hogan has $9 million ready to spend first thing this m orning. We don't have to match him, but we do need the funds to fight.** [**Donate $5 or more now, and let's turn Maryland blue again.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b984b/4138108340/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06268B") I am not running to the left or to the right -- I am running toward the people. Healthcare, education, ending mass incarceration, student debt, and the environment are all real issues everyone here in Maryland cares about. And unlike Governor Hogan, I have the vision, the plans, and the courage to risk my own political standing to attain real progress for the people. I know there is skepticism in many quarters about how Governor Hogan can be beaten. Well, I've got a message for those who think this race is already over: **Larry Hogan is going to lose in November.** He's going to lose because he's never run against someone who knows the power of grassroots organizing. I was named Marylander of the Year by the _Baltimore Sun_ in 2013 because of the role I played in leading the effort to abolish the death penalty, helping assure the passage of marriage equality, chairing the effort to pass the DREAM Act, and working to expand voting rights. That wasn't work I did alone -- that was what happens when people come together to make real, grassroots progress. We can do it again, for everyone in our state -- if we do it together. We can create a future where we pursue the promise of Maryland. [**If you're ready for it, fund the fight against Larry Hogan: Donate $5 or more right now, and let's hit the ground running.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b984b/4138108340/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06268B") Thank you. God bless you, and God bless the free state of Maryland. Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b984b/4138108340/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06268B")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b984a/4138108340/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b98b5/4138108340/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b98b4/4138108340/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a671/7ab0e2c4/7feeab58/349b98b7/4138108340/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Jeffrey Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: I’m driving Austin crazy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, Haha at this point it’s getting kind of funny. At the end of every month Austin gets pretty annoyed with me. As the campaign manager, I force him to make hundreds of fundraising phone calls so we can reach our goals. I’ll be the first to admit it is not fun. It is a lot of hard work and asking people for money is not the easiest thing to do. However, neither of us are ashamed or afraid to ask for anyone’s financial support of the campaign. Do you know why? Because we are doing this for liberty. Both Austin and I are proud of this campaign, our team, and everything we are fighting for. We also use every dollar to advance the message of liberty and to win the primary in August. This month I might drive Austin crazy though. I have given him a goal to find 1,500 donors by the end of the month. Do you know what would help him? If you chipped in today. If we could get 100 online donors today, that would be a major dent in the goal. Here is a link to donate: [**https://secure.anedot.com/austinpetersen/donate_tb_today**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062718_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062718_fr&n=1) Friend, do you think you can help? Austin will give a big shout out to anyone that sends a big donation today on a Facebook livestream at some point this week. Please consider chipping in. [**You can click here to donate $500, $250, $100, $50, $25 or whatever number you want >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062718_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062718_fr&n=2) Thank you! Jeff Carson
Campaign Manager
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: Can Phil count on your vote on August 2nd?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Hey Peter --
On August 2nd, you’ll have your first chance to vote for Phil Bredesen to be your next United State Senator. Let me tell you why that vote will be so important.
Winning the Primary isn’t just about securing a spot on the November ballot — it’s also an important milestone as we head into the final months of this election.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to commit to vote for Phil Bredesen in the August Primary. It’s critical that we are able to count on supporters like you to get out the vote on Election Day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1507303/8133384/-123051355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDllZDU5NC0yYjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFyp3GaoQiputhXNcK1ocKwY18IEVFDAu3dVt0bRJ3k=)
[Commit to vote for Phil](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1507304/8133385/-123051355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDllZDU5NC0yYjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFyp3GaoQiputhXNcK1ocKwY18IEVFDAu3dVt0bRJ3k=)
While the crowds of supporters at our events and our strength in the polls have made it clear that our message is resonating with Tennesseans, votes are what will decide this election. Despite our momentum, some political pundits and Washington special interests still think this race leans toward our opponent.
They believe that, come November, the millions of dollars in attack ads that will be pumped into this race by partisan out-of-state mega donors will win out over Governor Bredesen’s message of working together to get things done for Tennessee.
**We have to prove them wrong — and August 2nd is your first chance to do it.**
[**Commit to vote for Phil Bredesen as your next United State Senator right now to show the pundits and partisans that Tennesseans are ready to change Washington in 2018.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1507305/8133386/-123051355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDllZDU5NC0yYjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFyp3GaoQiputhXNcK1ocKwY18IEVFDAu3dVt0bRJ3k=)
[Commit to vote for Phil](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1507306/8133387/-123051355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDllZDU5NC0yYjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFyp3GaoQiputhXNcK1ocKwY18IEVFDAu3dVt0bRJ3k=)
Thanks for being on our team,
—Bob
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen for Senate

name: Amy
subject: This is a time for action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

This is a time for action. I can't remember a time in recent years where we've seen more energy and activism among citizens of all ages and backgrounds, some of whom have never been involved in politics before.

All over Minnesota and the country, Americans have been coming together and raising their voices to demand action on climate change, protections for voters, fair immigration policies, and more.

We're not just resisting, we're insisting on a better way forward. And our country is at its best when people speak up and take action.

**The fact is, I can 't do any of this work without you. So ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline on June 30th, I'm asking you to show your support by making a donation -- whatever you can.** We have an ambitious $80,000 goal this quarter, and I know we can get there with your help.

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Must-see headlines [NEW poll]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there,
You have to see these headlines after a brand-new poll shows Beto and Ted Cruz within single digits:
**Beto O'Rourke is within 5 points of Ted Cruz**
* * *

**Poll: Ted Cruz, Beto O'Rourke locked in tight Senate race**
* * *

**Ted Cruz leads Beto O'Rourke by 5 points**
When we see headlines like this, I get really excited. Ted Cruz has national name ID after his (failed) run for president in 2016. He has a national donor base, the Koch brothers and a huge operation of PACs and consultants. And incumbents are hard to beat. **But this poll shows all of our nonstop work paying off as we gain on Cruz. And you gotta know how amazing that is four months out!**
Beto's success is shocking to those who want to look at our race with the conventional, old-school political playbook. After all, we don't rely on PACs. No corporations or special interests either. But you know what we DO have? Thousands of real people just like you, devoting their time, talent and grassroots donations to power our movement every step of the way.
[**Right now, Beto and our team are up against a steep end-of-quarter fundraising goal of raising $200,000 online before 11:59 pm on June 30. This is our first quarter deadline since the Kochs announced attacks against Beto. Everyone's watching to see if we have what it takes to fight back. Chip in a donation of $3 right now to help Beto reach his goal and keep the pressure on Cruz.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921b0/3b1d797/79ee5881/35a9846d/120765328/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ3&amount=3")
Our volunteer organizing team is knocking on doors and organizing in communities across Texas, getting people fired up to get involved with our campaign. Thousands and thousands of volunteers are putting in countless hours to talk to voters and make a difference. And Beto has visited with Texans in every single one of our state's 254 counties (remember, Texas is bigger than a lot of countries!), hosting hundreds of public town halls.
The pundits and insiders keep asking -- can we keep up the energy, the excitement, around this campaign? But folks who are a part of this grassroots team know the answer: Heck yes we can.
[**We can't do it alone, though. We're counting on you and the rest of our grassroots team to help Beto reach his end-of-quarter goal of raising $200,000 online. Can you step up today with a donation of $3 so we can continue cutting Cruz's narrow lead?**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921b0/3b1d797/79ee5881/35a9846d/120765328/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ3&amount=3")
This week's poll is incredible, and so are these headlines. But we can't take any of this for granted. We have no choice but to close out the quarter with everything we've got. Thanks for working so hard to make Texas a better place.
Talk soon,
Chris Evans
Beto for Texas
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921b0/3b1d797/79ee5881/35a9846d/120765328/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ3&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas

name: Peter
subject: Reason One: Donald Trump and Paul Ryan 😱
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Everyone will be judging the strength of our campaign based on this finance report. |
---

| | Peter,

I know there are a lot of other Democratic campaigns asking for your money right now. **Here 's my pitch for why [you should make a donation to become an Official General Election Member of Joe's campaign.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e3a/7377f838/3ce20474/51f9d64c/3669562451/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-membercard?refcode=20180627.1nd&amount=10")**
1. **Donald Trump has personally campaigned for our opponent, and Paul Ryan has even asked Republicans to help elect him.** This race is going to be very close, and every single dollar you give could be the dollar that helps get out those last few votes and win.

2. **We 're up against the first end-of-quarter deadline of the general election.** Everyone will be judging the strength of our campaign based on this finance report. The media will say whether or not they think we can win, and national Democratic organizations will be deciding which races to invest in -- we have to show that we're more than viable. We have to show that we can win!

3. **We 're pacing behind on our $40,000 online goal**... and all signs point to our opponent raking in a ton of money. We need the resources to respond to his attacks.

Need another reason to be a contributing part of our team? **Ok: Become a member before midnight on June 30, and we 're DOUBLE MATCHING YOUR DONATIONS. That means your gift will go THREE TIMES AS FAR.**

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: protecting your health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hey there,
You might be wondering why you just got an email from a Senator all the way in Missouri. The answer is simple -- I need your help in a fight that could affect not just Granite Staters and Missourians, but Americans across the country.
My likely opponent, Josh Hawley, is one of the leaders in a lawsuit that would slash protections for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions, attempting to clear the way for insurance companies to deny coverage to anyone who's ever had the nerve to get sick. It's scary stuff, everyone.
I'm fighting tooth and nail to protect and improve our health care system, but I need all the help I can get. The GOP has already spent nearly $10 million to flip this seat for Hawley, who'd be a rubber stamp on the worst parts of their agenda.
Make no mistake, if the GOP gets its way, not only Missouri and New Hampshire -- but everyone across the country would feel the devastating effects of their dangerous agenda.
[**Please, do you think you could chip in just $3 before Saturday's FEC deadline to help me fight back against the GOP? clean_body: Hey there, You might be wondering why you just got an email from a Senator all the way in Missouri. The answer is simple -- I need your help in a fight that could affect not just Granite Staters and Missourians, but Americans across the country. My likely opponent, Josh Hawley, is one of the leaders in a lawsuit that would slash protections for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions, attempting to clear the way for insurance companies to deny coverage to anyone who's ever had the nerve to get sick. It's scary stuff, everyone. I'm fighting tooth and nail to protect and improve our health care system, but I need all the help I can get. The GOP has already spent nearly $10 million to flip this seat for Hawley, who'd be a rubber stamp on the worst parts of their agenda. Make no mistake, if the GOP gets its way, not only Missouri and New Hampshire -- but everyone across the country would feel the devastating effects of their dangerous agenda. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Claire McCaskill and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" We can win this fight together. Thank you, Claire ""

name: Keith Ellison
subject: The Muslim ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Now's the time to get some fire in our bellies and show President Trump and the Republicans we are not going to let them get away with their relentless attacks.
---
Our country has gone through some ugly days, Derek -- and yesterday is going to go down as one of them.

The Supreme Court in the 1850s said that it was OK to own a black person, and that was the Dred Scott decision. That decision hit the dustbin of history -- and the decision to uphold Trump's Muslim ban will too.

The Republican Party thinks that because they stole a Supreme Court seat and gave themselves a 5-4 majority, they can jam any racist, xenophobic, ugly policy down the throats of the American people. But we don't have to take it, Derek -- we can start fighting back right now.

**Saturday is a critical FEC fundraising deadline. Fight back by chipping in $3 right now to regain a Senate majority in 2018 and the White House in 2020. That's the only way we take back the federal judiciary from these conservative extremists.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e6/1388364104/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e7/1388364104/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e4/1388364104/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e5/1388364104/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e2/1388364104/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e3/1388364104/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")
** Republicans think there are no consequences for stealing a Supreme Court seat, trying to take away our health care, ripping off the middle class to pay for massive tax breaks for the wealthy, refusing to stand up to the gun lobby, and ignoring the crisis that's happening at the border.

Now's the time to show President Trump and the Republicans that we are not going to let them get away with their cruel attacks. Democrats are ready to organize and win in 2018, 2020, and beyond -- but it is going to take everyone standing together right now.

**[Chip in $3 before Saturday's FEC deadline to help regain a Senate majority in 2018 and the White House in 2020 so we can stop the takeover of our federal judiciary.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e0/1388364104/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")**

In solidarity,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. I'm a proud Muslim American -- this week's Supreme Court decision upholding Trump's travel ban is personal for me. I'm going to fight back with everything I've got. **[Will you join me by contributing $3 today?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73e1/1388364104/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Will+you+join+me+by+contributing++if+con&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3")**

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73ef/1388364104/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73ec/1388364104/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&refcode=em_20180627_ke_s3"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521270/4067b0a/65b0ecc6d/7fbe73ed/1388364104/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180627_ke_s3&source=em_20180627_ke_s3"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: On last night's wins...
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300a/9e00690/4688d341/2402d077/3581344056/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends --

Last night we saw that when progressives run unapologetically on who they are and what they believe, anything is possible.

In New York, a 28-year-old newcomer whose parents aren't famous toppled a long-time incumbent. In Maryland, my friend Ben Jealous, a progressive running on Medicare-for-All and a $15 minimum wage, soared to victory and is ready to be his state's next Governor.

**[Friends -- we've been running that playbook for more than a year, and more than ever, I know that we're heading to victory in August and November. Can you chip in $5 to power this progressive movement?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300a/9e00690/4688d341/2402d076/3581344056/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Friends++wersquove+been+running+that+pla")**

I'm the only non-millionaire running in this race, and I can't do this without you. Stand with us today, and let's bring this progressive wave to Florida!

Bring it home,

Andrew

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb300a/9e00690/4688d341/2402d009/3581344056/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_EOQ2_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,

clean_body: "" Friends -- Last night we saw that when progressives run unapologetically on who they are and what they believe, anything is possible. In New York, a 28-year-old newcomer whose parents aren't famous toppled a long-time incumbent. In Maryland, my friend Ben Jealous, a progressive running on Medicare-for-All and a $15 minimum wage, soared to victory and is ready to be his state's next Governor. "" I'm the only non-millionaire running in this race, and I can't do this without you. Stand with us today, and let's bring this progressive wave to Florida! Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Tina Smith
subject: The Supreme Court just ruled against workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The Supreme Court just gave their decision in Janus vs. AFSCME. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0a9/3804230200/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180627_janus?source=rtw_20180627_em") **Friend, the Supreme Court just struck a giant blow against the rights of our labor family.** In a 5-4 ruling, the ultra-conservative justices overthrew settled law and took away the power of working people to band together and make change in their workplace. **[We must show everyone that despite this attack, workers are standing in solidarity across the country ready to organize and fight back. Will you add your name and stand in solidarity now?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0a9/3804230200/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180627_janus?source=rtw_20180627_em")** Let's be clear about who pushed this case: the same wealthy special interests, like Charles Koch, who have funded attack after attack on workers across the country. They spend hundreds of millions in dark money to fund court cases, super PACs, and anti-worker politicians like Mike Pence and Scott Walker. And this case will only further empower them to double down and spend even more money to limit the power of unions and working families. **I want to send a message that we are not backing****down,****and that we are continuing to stand together and ready to take them on. Will you join me?** **[Add your name and stand in solidarity with workers who are under attack.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0a9/3804230200/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180627_janus?source=rtw_20180627_em")** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0a9/3804230200/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180627_janus?source=rtw_20180627_em") The right to collectively bargain for fair working conditions is a bedrock value for me. That's why I've been on the picket lines with the Teamsters, touring factories and talking to workers, and fought to raise the wage here in Minnesota. There is nothing more personal than the power to earn a fair wage and be respected in the workplace, and we can't back down. In solidarity, Tina **[Add Your Name](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0a9/3804230200/VEsD/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180627_janus?source=rtw_20180627_em")**
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4be86/c1f7015/6be85338/1142e0aa/3804230200/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). subject: Sorry, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Apologies, team. But yes, even at this time on a Wednesday, I need you for a second. Our FEC deadline is coming up this Saturday, and we're still short of our $30,000 goal. And with all that's going on, "short" is not something we want to be. **[I need you to give whatever amount you can before time runs out.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3f/622b7b5b/1b891bf5/307b9f2a/1708037850/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180627?refcode=dwse180627_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** And remember, when you do that, you're not just helping me. You're helping turnout the vote in FL-23. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3f/622b7b5b/1b891bf5/307b9f2a/1708037850/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180627?refcode=dwse180627_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping us build a grassroots network dedicated to holding the Trump administration accountable. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3f/622b7b5b/1b891bf5/307b9f2a/1708037850/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180627?refcode=dwse180627_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping us fight to protect Medicare and Social Security. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3f/622b7b5b/1b891bf5/307b9f2a/1708037850/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180627?refcode=dwse180627_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you're helping our efforts to preserve affordable health care for all of our families. Every time you give, no matter how much you give, you make this network stronger. You show Republicans that they will not bully us into silence. And these days, when we even have a bully in the White House, that is more important than anything. [**Give what you can, whatever amount makes sense. Every dollar matters.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f3f/622b7b5b/1b891bf5/307b9f2a/1708037850/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180627?refcode=dwse180627_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie Sent from my iPad. Please excuse any typos

name: Katie McGinty
subject: I’m standing with Kyrsten
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRVjjyW8IEYT206DlFyUkA==/mBdotJsakPxtbrvlnmlnRA==)
Friends,

Protecting our environment has to be one of our top priorities.

Having served as Chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality for President Clinton, and as Secretary of the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection, my career has been dedicated to preserving our natural heritage.

It was a central part of my platform when I ran for the United States Senate in Pennsylvania in 2016.

**That 's why I'm proud to support another passionate environmental advocate in her race for the Senate: Kyrsten Sinema.**

**Kyrsten is running a tough race in Arizona. Will you consider making a contribution to her campaign today, so we can send an environmental champion to the Senate?**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRVjjyW8IEYT206DlFyUkA==/mBdotJsakPxtbrvlnmlnRA==)
---
In Congress, Kyrsten has worked to reduce pollution, protect Arizona's public lands, and help ensure Arizona families have clean air to breathe and clean water to drink.

**Arizonans can be proud they have a member of Congress - and future Senator - who cares so deeply about our environment and its future.**

It's why I'm proudly standing with Kyrsten in this race - and I hope you will as well.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRVjjyW8IEYT206DlFyUkA==/mBdotJsakPxtbrvlnmlnRA==)
---
Thanks for supporting Kyrsten. Our nation's environmental protections are at risk and need the support of a champion like Kyrsten in the Senate.

Katie McGinty

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRVjjyW8IEYT206DlFyUkA==/mBdotJsakPxtbrvlnmlnRA==)
---

Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

name: Paul Davis
subject: Direct attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukwT0Z7Go5t2ckLXYq2bC3l5t11s3FH8nB1YdFhfFLU=/sIbQyEcUAf2MGW0jz-DheriG-gMVpDdQQIWuz3vR9-E=?gpsid=13_36_1672&refcode=em18_180627_Janus_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_Janus_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

This morning the Supreme Court issued a historic attack on working people, including thousands of Kansas state employees.

The attack came via the court's ruling on _Janus v. AFSCME Council 31_. It upended a 40-year-old court decision that has enabled public workers to pool their resources and negotiate for fair pay, retirement security, and affordable healthcare.

In Kansas, this long-standing decision helped underpaid public employees secure their first raise in a decade. It helped corrections workers demand action when Sam Brownback's budget cuts led to severe understaffing and dangerous prison riots. And it led to laws that stabilized the state retirement system so Kansas' 17,000 public employees can rest assured that their rightfully-earned pension will be there for them when they need it.

But today, instead of protecting everyday working people who are already struggling to get by in this rigged economy, the Court sided with powerful CEOs, billionaires and corporate special interests who continue to rake in record profits.

I've been a fighter for working Kansans for my entire career and I won't stand by and just watch the rights of Kansans be stripped away. One way to fight back against devastating court rulings like this is to stand together and elect leaders who will pass laws that protect working families.

**[Now, more than ever, we need to get back to our state's roots and fight for working people. So please, chip in $5 or more now and help me fight back.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukwT0Z7Go5t2ckLXYq2bC3l5t11s3FH8nB1YdFhfFLU=/sIbQyEcUAf2MGW0jz-DheriG-gMVpDdQQIWuz3vR9-E=?gpsid=13_36_1672&refcode=em18_180627_Janus_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_Janus_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

In solidarity,

Paul

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukwT0Z7Go5t2ckLXYq2bC3l5t11s3FH8nB1YdFhfFLU=/nkES9IromRCPbOnmMNx5dCgidBhKGp0vyNh2DsCoiyY=).

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: they’ve gone too far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
What we’re seeing is unbelievable... |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

I've been through many elections in my life.

But never have I seen anything like the vicious rhetoric coming from the Democrats, Hollywood, and their liberal advocates in the media.

We can't let America's future be determined by the loudest voices in the media. _It must be determined by YOU._

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Stand up for people with pre-existing conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
Take action today! Stand up to Trump attacks on the millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions. | | |
### _[TAKE ACTION: DEMAND THE TRUMP ADMINISTRATION STOP ATTACKS ON PROTECTIONS FOR PEOPLE WITH PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h0/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmj0YdgT1vtub41vOltHuCKv-2BUkabrgxz8sorYcKkSjmK-2FoPdXSYIkZ7GZ1VJE6znd9KK5kfe4kWngF31Ek2JHFuLfpiRWBr-2Fvsbt9-2BF8jlNK-2FZhImCE9j6-2BFV4-2BS-2Fz0wek8hrrTSMA59lmRGU-2F78ZTgH7Xp-2FX9ZQ-2BG-2F0h-2FZayFHCjQVlOj9HPqsyzUWarfy-2BBp4FsPJRSujEZBlqBCA8qDj7nyiD-2BkCtgagy8ZIYwARxCkH1tsVapalu-2FJl6O1MNSHfbjQZdu1xPjxGImHSoPq1aSCYd7rsHE0nS4fzF1Q4O7wYnK8EUhgrwhpOaaWfzuqdPLT4XDSfAfG8qrn5-2BqyMntdqCQQIbaVuZE-2FYD3dYqerVpPK1dg-2B1lxE2XABugf11Jg3oI3jmuHGNNAcCHZD)_

Dear Friend, Protection for 4.8 million Ohioans and millions more Americans that have pre-existing conditions are under attack by the Trump Administration. Last week the President sided with big insurance companies and went after sick people who have pre-existing medical conditions — everything from pregnancy to psoriasis and from hypertension to cancer.

So anxious to kill Obamacare is this president that he wants to take us back to a time when people died before they could afford medical attention. **We must protect the 4.8 million Ohioans who have a pre-existing condition.**
And unsurprisingly, Congressional Republicans like Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell aren’t doing a thing to ensure these protections stay in place. And many Republican leaders in Ohio, like Mike DeWine, are silent. Again.
**No one should go bankrupt or lose their coverage because they have a pre-existing condition.[Join me in signing this petition -- to tell President Trump and Republican Leaders in Congress to stop their attacks on Americans with pre-existing conditions.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h1/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmj0YdgT1vtub41vOltHuCKv-2BUkabrgxz8sorYcKkSjmK-2FoPdXSYIkZ7GZ1VJE6znd9KK5kfe4kWngF31Ek2JHFuLfpiRWBr-2Fvsbt9-2BF8jlNK-2FZhImCE9j6-2BFV4-2BS-2Fz0wfzt6ogGyEdBjig0pvKdBxWJC4EzJDvzwxgDnCw-2BFoAvD5A81E5VoSSSAqp-2FXUgm1CnsmNw84-2FvCUT0StQLIOuJtAQ7VwmcChRDwq802-2BHoDxSRZf5E7LfI9NfMxVeK2-2FUMcaJXGQbIQnYmhC1oWzLt3vDXV7SY0E0WEZOQgr90BrzB-2BCfw7spqGeolnuzI87pHBdxDmshsXvb3LR3vXAq0N6L3F83tu3ifRslgvsaYqH0UbuG5JeuozIsZYeLvwQ53OvhWdf2wex8O7MIBqPf8)**

## [](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h2/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmj0YdgT1vtub41vOltHuCKv-2BUkabrgxz8sorYcKkSjmK-2FoPdXSYIkZ7GZ1VJE6znd9KK5kfe4kWngF31Ek2JHFuLfpiRWBr-2Fvsbt9-2BF8jlNK-2FZhImCE9j6-2BFV4-2BS-2Fz0wdAv5GDXnemjhZCSGCVHJWm92SvPf4aYN-2FZ5UFbce2iJSgkYWFez3g-2FO-2B9cSigrNym1tL5T0KHKrVFfBVbq6Tcctf5EzzZOzWMW4uWxnJFeluNKSMLPnZxTdyq-2BhnbAn89L3s-2F-2FYUwxf0RHfs9UGurfnkSj5lfhfcwufirUkPedeg2Wrbgdft5mc4cClA-2F2zwMy9CZqNjvyIdrKwDJHXPAfYg-2BuEbO6350uS6OjPY9J8oeKhhMCv2eApLgHEd1M9TCvL6t-2FgNK12j9-2BPG-2BuO-2FWX)_
_
## _[ADD YOUR NAME >>>](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h3/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmj0YdgT1vtub41vOltHuCKv-2BUkabrgxz8sorYcKkSjmK-2FoPdXSYIkZ7GZ1VJE6znd9KK5kfe4kWngF31Ek2JHFuLfpiRWBr-2Fvsbt9-2BF8jlNK-2FZhImCE9j6-2BFV4-2BS-2Fz0wedHi4Z-2FRkkZ-2FucIFN3zXdfJ-2Bnw-2F9EzmIa0muEi1faTbqFQlo425aL-2BF3Gv3E1TuXjNRTM1LhQxEYRtDg2O1NcU7rDxgKLdwzT88pt2EOLG1KdxCyodSMFiat0s9EbyhNZydouU9snI5fpe288oANOVGRKH-2BLQLVVTL7O6hJQAfDR6qf1H4U0Fkqd-2FXFLlPVNaZjYKSVfW-2F-2Fy7aQ8tdDLrR7gLMS8XhT-2FhaOZebkb0nkhB1xjXq4naInk-2Ft3-2B-2BlB6r07BQmSSxjavAP13lk7SJ0)_
No one should be denied coverage in this country. Whether you have chronic asthma or cancer everyone deserves access to affordable medical care. We fought for the Affordable Care Act to make progress and fix the broken parts of our health care system.

Under Trump’s watch we have seen premiums skyrocket. We should be working to improve our healthcare system, instead Republicans spend every waking hour sabotaging the Affordable Care Act and the progress we have made.
This Administration and Congressional Republicans want to give the tip the scales hard in favor of their donors and insurance companies. They want to take us back to an era where if you get sick, you could lose your insurance.
**[I hope you will join us and fight back today.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h4/WQ-2BlIwq7W2eCmkkcwbDiBbZZ8k6zBVQtuO7myuMWelmj0YdgT1vtub41vOltHuCKv-2BUkabrgxz8sorYcKkSjmK-2FoPdXSYIkZ7GZ1VJE6znd9KK5kfe4kWngF31Ek2JHFuLfpiRWBr-2Fvsbt9-2BF8jlNK-2FZhImCE9j6-2BFV4-2BS-2Fz0wfMs3js3fLF7hg7VAqjZwpRAscRhHhseL6r92r-2FmH9pI0J2Hq-2B1nYQXkjd3G5DTgvK8NgKFVBo1x4Hf2O3Xk8AEQXmM68PlBrEpMxyuT7uKsIHbuepusuKLyv7bMlvLRqN8f4i8NqC07qJ6r47qUbxgzpQqPlJI-2BwNL-2FGlFA0dMeMqYN3PrCWq605K5Q7ktSa-2Bum-2BqJ6e50aRfnSzJfO5jqjNtKr6V-2BKC4-2B8AIYDksIq40CDs0F9Lky5-2FvqVhFBM5uuDWc2C5yEwBpq2FvljFQX)**
Thank you, Marcy [](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/CgE/kLwXAA/t.2io/eDfU9iqWTtaY2CLoXtO8bQ/h5/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFyzO2-2FUK73vgmYL4Te6YewHW3o3BU-2B86AOyQSaiiJEW-2FJYoEwXXeEYL6AtR00Cjz9USWc0zxFKsXV07zQa-2B-2FBJc8JDfoGaIS8dffHRiWqSYt2-2BoVItGYtkcj-2FrRfRxXg0BLvFQPNeJIKGp6PjJwCR2LzT8X2-2B77iCHSqG-2B6Bs8-2F8o2GZQSMmM4vc354nEqOQ8kZL6upMLfbV8CCd0dWKcBsfigHU3B-2FRfC-2FJfBmcZwdwOWfi-2FcpGV-2BdQcis-2B59A5z79DRyJ8uMCLBzVNyCgr8-2BEV9tLdR690i5hR1YZTw5FRBlpO9DtokXyYw9rSWa3bBzHQCZYdP3Gpoakv2xcisu)
