name: Team Scholten
subject: An important message from a life-long Republican who won't be voting for Steve King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
You hear from us so frequently, we thought we’d do something different this time and share an op-ed that appeared in yesterday’s _Forest City Summit_. This excellent piece was written by a “life-long Republican” who can no longer vote for Steve King. It very accurately sums up the feelings of so many people that we talk with across the 4th C.D. and it also underscores the importance of this fight. Please take a moment to read the story below, and then [**_join our efforts to win with a donation today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1510283/8147536/-367412744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFjMzU5OS01MjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jZTu-ZMdcnLnX5JrrH25czhTWej7e7llG_2gMaEeAk=)
* * *
**We can and must do better**
By: Raymond M. Beebe
In a recent issue of Time magazine, Steven Brill asked a question that is very sobering: "How did the world's greatest democracy and economy become a land of crumbling roads, galloping income inequality, bitter polarization, and dysfunctional government?"
I have previously commented I did not believe the country had ever been more polarized than it is right now and I doubt that any of you will disagree.
Measures of the nation's public engagement, satisfaction and confidence are far below what they were 50 years ago and in many cases have reached new historic lows.
In prior columns when urging everyone to support scholarships for our young people through contributions to the Forest City Education Foundation, I have pointed out there has never been a greater need for private support for our college-bound students and one of the factors that leads to that conclusion is that middle class wages when adjusted for inflation have been nearly frozen for four decades.
The recovery from the Great Recession of 2008, which saw banks and bankers bailed out while millions lost their homes, savings and jobs was reserved almost exclusively for the wealthiest. Their income in the three years following the crash went up by nearly a third while the bottom 99 percent saw an uptick of less than half of 1 percent.
Many parents today can provide very little or no financial help to their college-bound child because they have their hands full just "getting by." The ancient Greek philosopher, Aristotle, said a thriving middle class was critical for a democratic society. In one study, the United States was found to have the smallest middle class of nine countries and references are often made to America's disappearing middle class.
Many of us grew up in an era where parents expected their children to earn more than they had. But for adults now in their 30s, the chance of earning more than their parents has dropped to 50 percent from 90 percent just two generations earlier. Although the U.S. remains the world's richest economy, it has the third highest poverty rate among the 35 nations in the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development behind only Turkey and Israel. Nearly one in five American children lives in a household that the government classifies as "food insecure," meaning they are without "access to enough food for active, healthy living."
Americans today have virtually no confidence in Congress. And why would they when Congress' performance can only be described as pathetic. Congress has not passed a comprehensive budget on time without omnibus bills since 1994. There are more than 20 registered lobbyists for every member of Congress. Congressmen/women raise huge amounts of money and they gravitate toward the special-interest positions of their donors and their party's base. The party in control blocks virtually all legislation proposed by the other party and the vast majority vote along straight party lines. The many statesmen/women of the past who put country above party and saw the necessity for compromise are gone.
But while we know Congress is not performing, we re-elect the vast majority of incumbents’ election after election. I have been a life-long Republican but I am unable to vote for Steve King who is well known for his racist views and truly is an embarrassment to our state. Are you satisfied with the status quo? I am not and can't believe you are either. Let's do something about it. I will have more to say about these issues in future columns.
* * *
Every day we run into Republicans like Raymond Beebe who tell us they're tired of Steve King embarassing them and that they're ready for change too. [**_Help us create that change we're all looking for with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1510284/8147537/-367412744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFjMzU5OS01MjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jZTu-ZMdcnLnX5JrrH25czhTWej7e7llG_2gMaEeAk=)
Thank you,
Team Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1510285/8147538/-367412744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFjMzU5OS01MjdhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jZTu-ZMdcnLnX5JrrH25czhTWej7e7llG_2gMaEeAk=)

clean_body: Peter, You hear from us so frequently, we thought we’d do something different this time and share an op-ed that appeared in yesterday’s Forest City Summit. This excellent piece was written by a “life-long Republican” who can no longer vote for Steve King. It very accurately sums up the feelings of so many people that we talk with across the 4th C.D. and it also underscores the importance of this fight. Please take a moment to read the story below, and then = We can and must do better By: Raymond M. Beebe In a recent issue of Time magazine, Steven Brill asked a question that is very sobering: "How did the world's greatest democracy and economy become a land of crumbling roads, galloping income inequality, bitter polarization, and dysfunctional government?" I have previously commented I did not believe the country had ever been more polarized than it is right now and I doubt that any of you will disagree. Measures of the nation's public engagement, satisfaction and confidence are far below what they were 50 years ago and in many cases have reached new historic lows. In prior columns when urging everyone to support scholarships for our young people through contributions to the Forest City Education Foundation, I have pointed out there has never been a greater need for private support for our college-bound students and one of the factors that leads to that conclusion is that middle class wages when adjusted for inflation have been nearly frozen for four decades. The recovery from the Great Recession of 2008, which saw banks and bankers bailed out while millions lost their homes, savings and jobs was reserved almost exclusively for the wealthiest. Their income in the three years following the crash went up by nearly a third while the bottom 99 percent saw an uptick of less than half of 1 percent. Many parents today can provide very little or no financial help to their college-bound child because they have their hands full just "getting by." The ancient Greek philosopher, Aristotle, said a thriving middle class was critical for a democratic society. In one study, the United States was found to have the smallest middle class of nine countries and references are often made to America's disappearing middle class. Many of us grew up in an era where parents expected their children to earn more than they had. But for adults now in their 30s, the chance of earning more than their parents has dropped to 50 percent from 90 percent just two generations earlier. Although the U.S. remains the world's richest economy, it has the third highest poverty rate among the 35 nations in the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development behind only Turkey and Israel. Nearly one in five American children lives in a household that the government classifies as "food insecure," meaning they are without "access to enough food for active, healthy living." Americans today have virtually no confidence in Congress. And why would they when Congress' performance can only be described as pathetic. Congress has not passed a comprehensive budget on time without omnibus bills since 1994. There are more than 20 registered lobbyists for every member of Congress. Congressmen/women raise huge amounts of money and they gravitate toward the special-interest positions of their donors and their party's base. The party in control blocks virtually all legislation proposed by the other party and the vast majority vote along straight party lines. The many statesmen/women of the past who put country above party and saw the necessity for compromise are gone. But while we know Congress is not performing, we re-elect the vast majority of incumbents’ election after election. I have been a life-long Republican but I am unable to vote for Steve King who is well known for his racist views and truly is an embarrassment to our state. Are you satisfied with the status quo? I am not and can't believe you are either. Let's do something about it. I will have more to say about these issues in future columns. Every day we run into Republicans like Raymond Beebe who tell us they're tired of Steve King embarassing them and that they're ready for change too. = Thank you, Team Scholten = Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee Scholten4Iowa P.O. Box 3531 Sioux City, IA 51102 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c416c/24c69fd9/1968e1b33/1883f4b2/3502256670/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact&source=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact")

Peter,

We've helped more than 100 pro-choice Democratic women win their primary elections in the past two months!

We're officially halfway through primary season, and we're so blown away by this community's outpouring of support for our candidates that we're doing something big:

Membership cards are BACK -- through midnight tomorrow ONLY.

**[Donate $3 to become an EMILY's list member for 2018, and we'll send you the EMILY's List "Elect Women" membership card.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c416c/24c69fd9/1968e1b33/1883f4b3/3502256670/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_JuneMembershipDrive?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9050+to+renew+y&utm_campaign=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact&source=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact")**

Twenty-four states still have primary or runoff elections in July, August, and September.

The best way to show our women that we have their backs between now and Election Day is to get your very own EMILY's List membership card.

Trust me: Come November, you'll want to be able to say you were a card-carrying EMILY's List member this cycle.

**Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to become an EMILY's List member for 2018:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/June-Member-Drive](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c416c/24c69fd9/1968e1b33/1883f4ad/3502256670/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_JuneMembershipDrive?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgJuneMemberDrive&utm_campaign=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact&source=WQEFRR65N_digital_email_20180627_JuneMemDrive_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

\---

body:
Saturday at midnight marks the first public filing deadline of the 2018 general election, and we're still $16,500 away from reaching our goal. ---------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **_[Saturday at midnight](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e345508/4018697891/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Saturday+at+midnight&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all") marks the first public filing deadline of the 2018 general election, and we're still $16,500 away from reaching our goal._** | [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e34550f/4018697891/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")

_**General Election Fund**_
[Election Fund goal: **$200,000 in grassroots donations**
Total raised so far: **$183,500 raised this month**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e34550e/4018697891/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Election+Fund+goal++200000+in+grassroots&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")
[AMOUNT NEEDED: $16,500 in the next four days](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e34550d/4018697891/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+AMOUNT+NEEDED+16500+in+the+next+four+day&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")

[Help us reach our goal: Chip in now!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e34550c/4018697891/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Help+us+reach+our+goal+Chip+in+now&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")

---
Derek,

We're coming up on one of the most important fundraising deadlines between now and November: **The first public filing deadline of the 2018 general election.**

Our goal is to raise $200,000 in grassroots donations from supporters like you, Derek. And this team has stepped up in a BIG way since the _news broke about who our opponent is_.

But we're still $16,500 short - and our deadline is just four days away. **Make sure we get there:[Chip in to the Kaine 2018 General Election Fund now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e345502/4018697891/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+to+the+Kaine+2018+General+Electi&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")**

Our opponent, Corey Stewart, has said the key to him winning this race is Democrats not stepping up:
["The Democrats are arrogant and cocky ... None of these Democrats is going to give Tim Kaine a dime because they don't think he needs it, and that's why we're going to sneak up on him and defeat him."
\- Corey Stewart, during a campaign event](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e345501/4018697891/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+ldquoThe+Democrats+are+arrogant+and+cock&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")
---
This is our chance to show Corey Stewart and the Republicans that they're wrong about this campaign. **When our numbers go public after[Saturday's](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e345500/4018697891/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+Saturdayrsquos&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all") filing deadline, make sure Corey knows he won't be able "sneak up" on us: [Chip in now to help get us reach our goal!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ac/3e0906/68835d89/3e345507/4018697891/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+get+us+reach+our+goa&utm_campaign=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all&source=20180627_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-intro_all")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Make sure we get there: "" Our opponent, Corey Stewart, has said the key to him winning this race is Democrats not stepping up: "" This is our chance to show Corey Stewart and the Republicans that they're wrong about this campaign. When our numbers go public after "" filing deadline, make sure Corey knows he won't be able "sneak up" on us: "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this campaign, Team Kaine "" * | "" "" ""

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
If there was ever any question whether the November elections would be the most important of our lifetime, Justice Kennedy's retirement from the Supreme Court should remove all doubt.
---
If there was ever any question whether the November elections would be the most important of our lifetime, Justice Kennedy's retirement from the Supreme Court should remove all doubt.

**There's never been a more important moment to show you stand with Democrats, Derek -- make a $3 donation before Saturday's deadline to help elect Democrats this November:**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521285/4067b0a/65a7650ba/7fbe53d0/834949090/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kennedy-retirement?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp3_s3&source=em_20180627_tp3_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp3_s3")

** If you believe immigrant families belong together, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe in a woman's right to choose and a worker's right to bargain, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe health care is a right for all, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe a Muslim ban is fundamentally un-American, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe in full equality for LGBTQ people in all areas of our society, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe Dreamers should be able to stay and contribute to the only country they call home, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe climate change is an urgent threat to our economy, our environment, and our children's future, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe our leaders should put people before corporations, help elect Democrats in November.

If you believe we should make it easier for people to vote, not harder, help elect Democrats in November.

Democrats and Republicans should reject any nominee who won't uphold our Constitution and our basic human rights, and who would vote to overturn Roe v. Wade.

Elections have consequences. The last Supreme Court vacancy was brazenly stolen by shameless Republican leaders with no respect for American democracy. We cannot let that happen again. This November, you won't just be deciding the next Congress, you will be deciding the direction America goes in for the next half-century.

**[If the last year and a half has made you angry, there's something you can do right now: Donate $3 before Saturday's deadline to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521285/4067b0a/65a7650ba/7fbe53da/834949090/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-retirement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+If+the+last+year+and+a+half+has+made+you&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp3_s3&source=em_20180627_tp3_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp3_s3")**

Let's go,

Tom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521285/4067b0a/65a7650ba/7fbe53e6/834949090/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180627_tp3_s3&refcode=em_20180627_tp3_s3"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Aisling Kerins, Team Inslee
subject: When we sued Trump...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
When we sued Trump last week over his cruel immigration policy, we led the nation in action.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ea6/2f5ea88d/7017650d/2cbce1f4/1470926299/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, Last week, when we sued the Trump administration for its inhumane immigration policy, friend, we took the lead in standing up for our country's values. When Trump launches yet another vicious attack directly at our shared values, it's states like Washington, not D.C., that must and will fight back. Our responses, and our actions, set the national agenda -- not the do-nothings in the Republican Congress. Last week proved that now more than ever, we need you on our team. The more power we have to fight back, the more we can do right here in Washington to steer our country back on the right track. [**Join Team Jay right now, before our big end-of-June deadline, by chipping in $5 or more.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ea6/2f5ea88d/7017650d/2cbce1f4/1470926299/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ea6/2f5ea88d/7017650d/2cbce1f4/1470926299/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
Jay Inslee has been leading the charge for the nation on progressive legislation that proves how these ideas can transform our communities. He's been standing up for our values, even suing the federal government over Trump's utterly cruel treatment of immigrants. Jay doesn't just talk the talk -- he walks the walk.
D.C.'s been moving backwards on the issues we care about most -- immigration, clean energy, police reform, gun safety. But in Washington, Jay's taking action.
The states are leading the Trump resistance. And, at the same time, making real progress.
[**If you too believe in progressive action at the state level, chip in now to join the team. Join us in setting our national agenda together.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ea6/2f5ea88d/7017650d/2cbce1f4/1470926299/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
[CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78ea6/2f5ea88d/7017650d/2cbce1f4/1470926299/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-june-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-06-27_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
Thanks,
Aisling Kerins
Team Inslee

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A great victory for our political revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
I am happy to bring you some great news about the progress of our political revolution.
#
Friends -
I am happy to bring you some great news about the progress of our political revolution. **Last night, taking on almost all of the Democratic political establishment, our friend Ben Jealous won Maryland 's Democratic primary for governor.**
Ben's victory is yet another sign that candidates who run progressive, grassroots campaigns are not only winning the battle of ideas, they are winning elections. In Democratic primary after primary across this country, candidates are running and winning while supporting ideas like Medicare for all, a $15/hour living wage, progressive taxation, free tuition at public colleges and universities, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure and promoting racial, social and environmental justice.
Starting way down in the polls, Ben pulled off a huge upset last night and is now the Democratic candidate for governor of Maryland. But that's just the beginning. Ben now has to compete in the general election against an incumbent Republican governor who already has more than $8 million in the bank. I am absolutely confident that Ben can win this election, but he's going to need our continued help to make it happen. So I am asking:
**[Can you split a $3 donation between Ben Jealous' and my re-election campaign? I would not ask if it wasn't so important. Ben can win this race if we're with him. And if he does, it will be a major victory for the people of this country and for the ideas that power the political revolution.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full")**
These are, to say the least, unusual and unprecedented times for our country. We have a president who is unfit to hold his office and whose policies are the most anti-working class in the modern history of America.
One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Trump's right-wing extremism is by electing strong progressive leadership at all levels of government.
Former NAACP President Ben Jealous is one of the great progressive leaders in the United States of America. If elected, he is going to set a shining example of what is possible when an executive officer in this country works relentlessly to create an economy and a government that work for everyone, and not just the 1 percent.
Ben needs us. Help get his general election campaign off to a strong start.
**[Please split a $3 donation between Ben Jealous' campaign and my re-election. He can win this race if we're with him.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full")**
Thank you for continuing to fight for our political revolution. It is just as important today as it was when we launched our campaign for president three years ago.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_ben?refcode=em180627-t1-full")******

clean_body: I am happy to bring you some great news about the progress of our political revolution. Friends - I am happy to bring you some great news about the progress of our political revolution. Last night, taking on almost all of the Democratic political establishment, our friend Ben Jealous won Maryland 's Democratic primary for governor. Ben's victory is yet another sign that candidates who run progressive, grassroots campaigns are not only winning the battle of ideas, they are winning elections. In Democratic primary after primary across this country, candidates are running and winning while supporting ideas like Medicare for all, a $15/hour living wage, progressive taxation, free tuition at public colleges and universities, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure and promoting racial, social and environmental justice. Starting way down in the polls, Ben pulled off a huge upset last night and is now the Democratic candidate for governor of Maryland. But that's just the beginning. Ben now has to compete in the general election against an incumbent Republican governor who already has more than $8 million in the bank. I am absolutely confident that Ben can win this election, but he's going to need our continued help to make it happen. So I am asking: "" These are, to say the least, unusual and unprecedented times for our country. We have a president who is unfit to hold his office and whose policies are the most anti-working class in the modern history of America. One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Trump's right-wing extremism is by electing strong progressive leadership at all levels of government. Former NAACP President Ben Jealous is one of the great progressive leaders in the United States of America. If elected, he is going to set a shining example of what is possible when an executive officer in this country works relentlessly to create an economy and a government that work for everyone, and not just the 1 percent. Ben needs us. Help get his general election campaign off to a strong start. "" Thank you for continuing to fight for our political revolution. It is just as important today as it was when we launched our campaign for president three years ago. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders **** ""** ** Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

I know it's a big news week, and we both know what that means: more fake news attacks on President Trump.

Friend,

I know it's a big news week, and we both know what that means: more fake news attacks on President Trump.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ee/73a2bc12/3b665cbc/1fcdc5d8/3242118852/VEsH/ "http://wolfforpa.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180627_janus_fnd_gq_ful__JS_ettx&source=em18_180627_janus_fnd_gq_ful__JS_ettx") Hello,

If you weren't already convinced that a Scott Wagner administration would be a disaster for working people, consider this:

**_It didn't even take an hour for Wagner to celebrate a major attack on workers._**

This morning, the Trump Supreme Court issued a ruling in the Janus vs. AFSCME Council 31 case that overturns 40 years of case law that has helped enable unions to fight effectively for public sector workers. Wagner tweeted his support of their disastrous decision almost immediately.

Scott Wagner is thrilled because he thinks he can now take more money away from workers and give it to his wealthy friends and special interests. [**We can't have a leader like that in Harrisburg. So friend, can you rush a donation to make sure Governor Wolf has the resources to defeat Scott Wagner?**](https://secure.wolfforpa. Under Trump, we've seen unprecedented attacks on workers, Republican state legislators have been pushing their own attacks here in Pennsylvania, and now Republicans have succeeded in getting the Court to weaken unions too.

We need to fight to ensure that we're protecting workers' rights and helping them win a fair wage.

If Scott Wagner wins in November, we'll lose workers' last line of defense in our state government: Governor Wolf. We can't let that happen.

**[Chip in now, and help Governor Wolf fight back against the next round of attacks on workers -- before it's too late.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2ee/73a2bc12/3b665cbc/1fcdc5cb/3242118852/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-janus?gpsid=8_50_1659&refcode=em18_180627_janus_fnd_gq_ful__JS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_janus_fnd_gq_ful__JS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=14+-+Chip+in+now+and+help+Governor+Wolf+fight")**

Thanks for being a part of this fight,

Jeff Sheridan
Campaign Manager
Wolf for PA

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: My plans have changed, and now I need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | On Saturday, I will face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet.

We've been forced to reevaluate our entire budget since hearing that the Koch brothers are running ads against me! Read more below on why the Koch brothers are coming after me. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**The public outcry this month against family separation was swift, and legislation I cosponsored helped put pressure on the Trump administration to end the heinous practice.** I am continuing to work in the Senate to reunite families and ensure government agencies are keeping children safe. Our work is far from over, and without your help I won't be able to keep fighting for our values.

**Last month, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can 't overstate how big a victory this is.** Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed Americans that the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses. But we still have work to do to keep our internet free and open, and I need your help to do it. So please consider donating today.

[DONATE $10 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")
And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has the Koch brothers scared.

**The Koch brothers just launched ads against me in New Mexico, and we 've been forced to change all our campaign plans in response. That means focusing more on grassroots advocacy, increasing our ad spending, and hiring more staff.**

****_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To respond to this latest news, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $50,000 before our Saturday Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our new budget gap before we must publicly report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")_****

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ ****
****[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")**** ****[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")**** ******[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")****** ****[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q2?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=15+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO2_180627_1_1")**** Thank you for your support,
Martin

** **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hayden=20Shamel?=
subject: Why November Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hayden Shamel for Arkansas
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
# A Note From Hayden
Friends:

I believe that America was built upon the principles of kindness, compassion, inclusiveness, and hope. The divisiveness of the past few years has been heartbreaking. It is past time that we return to decency and civility in this country - and in November, voters will decide what we want going forward for our children.

The recent votes of our current representative are heartbreaking. If you read the headlines in Sunday's Democrat-Gazette, you saw that my opponent voted against an amendment to give well-deserved aid to military widows. He voted to rescind $7 billion in funding from the Children's Health Insurance Program - the health insurance that 48% of Arkansas kids depend upon. He voted to repeal net neutrality, effectively allowing ISPs to speed up or slow down service at their own discretion and to charge more for visiting certain websites.

Instead of voting against Arkansans, our representatives should be working on legislation to help them. I'm fighting to lower the cost of prescription medications, hold the federal government accountable for funds it has promised Arkansas schools, and to protect and strengthen Social Security for our people. Learn more about my plans for Arkansas [HERE](https://haydenforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00c7d4e4fc0f592a26f7d559b&id=58613315cd&e=fa4530268f).

Together, I know that we can and will create a better tomorrow for our children. I would love for you to get involved with this campaign. Talk to your friends and neighbors. Put a car magnet on your vehicle and a yard sign at your home. And if you're able and willing - donate whatever small amount you can.

Our democracy needs us. We have 132 days until the election. Let's get busy.

Hayden

name: Amy
subject: Our Highest Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Justice Anthony Kennedy just announced his retirement from the Supreme Court.

The 5-4 Supreme Court decisions in recent weeks remind us just how important each member of the Court is to securing the words engraved on the front of the Supreme Court building: "equal justice under law."

While we don't always see eye to eye, Justice Kennedy has been a pivotal swing vote in major cases that have changed the lives of millions of Americans -- from marriage equality to women's rights.

**He cannot be replaced by an ideologue.**

Justice Kennedy's replacement must be someone who will see both sides of the issues before the court and who will make decisions based on legal precedent, not ideology or personal beliefs.

As a member of the Judiciary Committee I'll work relentlessly to hold any nominee the President puts forward to this standard. The American people deserve nothing less, and they deserve a say.

The Supreme Court is too important.

Thanks for all that you do,

Amy

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The results are in:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a676/7ab0e2c4/7fe94fe4/349b9937/3199726913/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06278B") Friend, I am proud to be writing you as your Democratic nominee for governor of Maryland. I am the son of two teachers who were civil rights workers -- one an African American woman who grew up in the McCulloh Homes housing project in West Baltimore and who traces her roots to a slave turned statesman in Virginia; the other a white man whose family from New England fought and bled in the Revolutionary War. My parents left our state because their interracial marriage was against the law in Maryland in 1966. We have come a long way since those days, and a long way in this campaign. Yesterday we came together from all corners of Maryland to send a message to the Republican administration in Annapolis: **Your time in power is coming to an end.** Now voters in Maryland face a clear-cut choice: Larry Hogan's brand of "go along to get along" leadership, or a progressive future that makes Maryland greener, stronger, and more equal. **It's been a long primary, but we have to turn to the general election right away -- Larry Hogan has $9 million ready to spend today. We don't have to match him, but we do need the funds to fight.** [**Donate $5 or more now, and let's turn Maryland blue again.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a676/7ab0e2c4/7fe94fe4/349b9937/3199726913/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06278B") I am not running to the left or to the right -- I am running toward the people. Healthcare, education, ending mass incarceration, student debt, and the environment are all real issues everyone here in Maryland cares about. And unlike Governor Hogan, I have the vision, the plans, and the courage to risk my own political standing to attain real progress for the people. I know there is skepticism in many quarters about how Governor Hogan can be beaten. Well, I've got a message for those who think this race is already over: **Larry Hogan is going to lose in November.** He's going to lose because he's never run against someone who knows the power of grassroots organizing. I was named Marylander of the Year by the _Baltimore Sun_ in 2013 because of the role I played in leading the effort to abolish the death penalty, helping assure the passage of marriage equality, chairing the effort to pass the DREAM Act, and working to expand voting rights. That wasn't work I did alone -- that was what happens when people come together to make real, grassroots progress. We can do it again, for everyone in our state -- if we do it together. We can create a future where we pursue the promise of Maryland. [**If you're ready for it, fund the fight against Larry Hogan: Donate $5 or more right now, and let's hit the ground running.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a676/7ab0e2c4/7fe94fe4/349b9937/3199726913/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06278B") Thank you. God bless you, and God bless the free state of Maryland. Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a676/7ab0e2c4/7fe94fe4/349b9937/3199726913/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight?refcode=OHQ06278B")
---

subject: I need your help

body:

Tom

name: breaking@rosenfornevada.com
subject: the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
**BREAKING: JUSTICE ANTHONY KENNEDY RETIRES**
_The Washington Post_ : this "gives President Trump the chance to ... dramatically shift the institution to the right"
[**CHIP IN AND DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT TO WIN IN NEVADA'S RACE TO DECIDE SENATE CONTROL AND PROTECT THE SUPREME COURT ****> >**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d0/4fbb2af3/7e238ae1/5e8bf104/3379845783/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg2OC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk868-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This is urgent - Justice Anthony Kennedy announced today that he's retiring, giving President Trump another opportunity to nominate another ultra-conservative, extremist judge to a lifetime position on the Supreme Court. What happens next?

Senator Dean Heller will likely do what he does best: rubber stamp another nominee from President Trump, regardless of how much it will hurt everyday Nevadans. **This could be a full-on disaster for our voting rights, a woman 's right to choose, protections for pre-existing conditions, and more.**

We have to fight back with all we've got. **The future of the Supreme Court is now fully in play.** We can't protect it without taking back the Senate for Democrats this year - and we CAN'T take back the Senate without defeating Dean Heller in Nevada.
[**Give $5 or more right now - all contributions will be MATCHED ahead of our critical end-of-quarter deadline - to help us repeal and replace Trump's favorite rubber stamp and protect the Supreme Court. **](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6d0/4fbb2af3/7e238ae1/5e8bf104/3379845783/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg2OC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk868-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

clean_body: BREAKING: JUSTICE ANTHONY KENNEDY RETIRES The Washington Post : this "gives President Trump the chance to ... dramatically shift the institution to the right" "" This is urgent - Justice Anthony Kennedy announced today that he's retiring, giving President Trump another opportunity to nominate another ultra-conservative, extremist judge to a lifetime position on the Supreme Court. What happens next? Senator Dean Heller will likely do what he does best: rubber stamp another nominee from President Trump, regardless of how much it will hurt everyday Nevadans. This could be a full-on disaster for our voting rights, a woman 's right to choose, protections for pre-existing conditions, and more. We have to fight back with all we've got. The future of the Supreme Court is now fully in play. We can't protect it without taking back the Senate for Democrats this year - and we CAN'T take back the Senate without defeating Dean Heller in Nevada. "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for taking a stand, Team Rosen "" Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. body:

| **BREAKING: Justice Kennedy is retiring
Trump will pick an UBER-CONSERVATIVE JUDGE to replace him.

[Defending Senator Nelson's seat has never been more important. We need $10,000 in our Rapid Response Fund ASAP to ensure Rick Scott's DEFEAT ->](http://act.floridadems. Kennedy's most influential rulings on everything from abortion access to gay marriage could be permanently undermined.

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: GOP extremists are coming for Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
The GOP's deep-pocketed donors are spending millions of dollars to replace Joe with an extreme Republican who will vote however the party tells him. |
---

| | Peter,

The GOP's deep-pocketed donors are spending millions of dollars to replace Joe with an extreme Republican who will vote however the party tells him.

There's more -- our race is a pure toss-up. President Trump and Mitch McConnell see it as one of their best bets for a Republican pickup in the Senate.

We can't let it happen -- and we need you on our team. **Will you become an Official Member of Team Donnelly and get your donation DOUBLE MATCHED?** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e07/7377f838/3cfe2eb0/51f9d230/858607433/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-membercard?refcode=20180627.2nd&amount=10")

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez won (and we're next)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Last night was an earthquake in Democratic politics.
#

Peter -
Last night was an earthquake in Democratic politics. **_Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez won her primary against an incumbent who outspent her 10-1._**
[](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e53/6e822e2f/1b14d7fa/417261e4/91030534/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-june?refcode=em180627-full")
I was proud to endorse Alexandria before she got national attention.
This is the biggest news in New York politics in years and is an epic victory for progressives. Alexandria ran a truly inspirational, anti-corporate, people-powered campaign, standing up for Medicare for all and abolish ICE. Her win is a testament to what's possible when you run a bold, progressive campaign that speaks directly to voters.
**What 's more exciting? We're next. If you're with us, we're going to win this race.**
**[Make a $3 donation right now to help keep this momentum going. The political and financial establishment wants to stop us, but together, we will continue this progressive earthquake this fall.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e53/6e822e2f/1b14d7fa/417261e4/91030534/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-june?refcode=em180627-full")**
Alexandria's win shows that voters are looking for big change from big money to people-powered campaigns, that status-quo politics are not going to suffice, and that the strength of a fearless woman determined to change the world should never be underestimated.
This is not the time to be cautious or afraid. This moment demands courage and boldness. This is our chance to reject the learned helplessness of the Democratic Party establishment. There is too much on the line to do anything less.
Follow the earthquake.
\- Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e53/6e822e2f/1b14d7fa/417261e4/91030534/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-june?refcode=em180627-full")**

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: BREAKING: Justice Kennedy Retiring, President Trump to Shape Supreme Court for Generations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
By now you’ve seen the news that U.S. Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, giving President Donald J. Trump an historic opportunity... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/breaking-justice-kennedy-retiring-president-trump-to-shape-supreme-court-for-generations?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **BREAKING: Justice Kennedy Retiring
_President Trump to Shape Supreme Court for Generations_**
---
|
---
| | Fellow Republicans,

By now, you’ve seen the news that [U.S. Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=adc6142271&e=1acd9bb3d6), giving President Donald J. Trump an historic opportunity to shape the direction of the court, and our nation, for generations to come.

Of course, Democrat obstructionists, like Joe Donnelly’s pal and boss, Chuck Schumer, are already crying foul and trying to play games with the nomination. We can’t let them win.

Just as President Trump kept his campaign promise last year to put a proven constitutional conservative on the bench with Neil Gorsuch, we can expect him to choose yet another mainstream conservative with a solid reputation and impeccable record to join our country’s highest court. But he cannot do it alone.

We need to make sure that the Democrats’ “blue wave” hits a “red wall” in Indiana this November. We need to send President Trump reinforcements in the Senate – like Mike Braun - to block Democrat obstruction and confirm the President’s next choice for the Supreme Court.

---
| [SHARE ON FACEBOOK: LET'S BE THE RED WALL](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7f6a4f9cf4&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE ON FACEBOOK: LET'S BE THE RED WALL")
---
| No matter when the vote ultimately takes place, today’s news changes the November equation by putting added pressure on Democrat Joe Donnelly and increasing the importance of electing Mike Braun, a proven conservative ally of President Trump, to the United States Senate.

Who knows what Democrat Donnelly will do if he’s faced with this confirmation vote. But we know, for sure, what Mike Braun will do. He will always stand with President Trump and that’s why we need him in the Senate.

[Share this news on Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=301e9a2b90&e=1acd9bb3d6), and let's be the "red wall" blocking Democrat obstruction this November!

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d6deabc7df&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Team Beto
subject: Everything we care about is on the line (Supreme Court)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
This couldn't be more urgent, folks.
Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy has just announced his retirement, opening up a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the nation. We have no doubt that Donald Trump will select a dangerous nominee who will pledge to undo the progress we've made over the last decade and change the course of this country for a generation. But that nominee must get 51 votes in the Senate. That's where you come in.
**[The stakes of this election simply couldn't be higher. Are we going to sit back and allow Ted Cruz to sign off on the next justice? We can't. We have to do everything we can to win this November and ensure Beto is in the Senate to be a check on any nominees to the Supreme Court. We need you to make an urgent donation of $3 today.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921ae/3b1d797/79a6d923/35a982b0/3487310102/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ4&amount=3")**
Everything we care about is on the line if we don't win this November:
* Voting rights, civil rights and workers rights
* Healthcare and protections for those with pre-existing conditions
* A woman's right to choose
* LGBTQ equality
* Finally getting big money out of politics

[**In the last week alone, the Supreme Court has issued close rulings on travel bans, workers' rights, voting rights and a woman's right to choose. Each of us has to do everything we can to make sure Beto is in the Senate when the next confirmation vote is called. Pitch in a critical pledge of $3 today so we can go all in to win this make-or-break senate seat.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921ae/3b1d797/79a6d923/35a982b0/3487310102/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ4&amount=3")
Today's news makes hitting our end-of-quarter goal and winning this election all the more important. Control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court hangs in the balance.
Thanks,
Team Beto
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921ae/3b1d797/79a6d923/35a982b0/3487310102/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180627-EOQ4&amount=3")**

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Thank You
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff33/767134fb/5f46aac6/43384c2a/3860900462/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I am writing you to say thank you for everything you've done to support my race for County Executive. I appreciate everyone who made calls, knocked on doors, and invested in my campaign. I do not take your support for granted, and it was a privilege to run a campaign that put our most vulnerable communities first. Thank you to my family, Jared and Kali, my mom and my sisters, my friends who have stood by me, and my staff running one of the scrappiest campaigns this county has ever seen. I spent the last six months listening to working people across our county--seniors fighting to pay for their prescriptions; working people in the county who for decades didn't feel like their government worked for them. We built a people-powered campaign focused on the people, not industries or big developers. I'm proud of the conversation we started together. I extend my congratulations to Angela Alsobrooks, the winner of the Democratic Primary for County Executive. I encourage State's Attorney Alsobrooks to reach across the expansive wings of Democrats across our county, to hear those voices, to give them a seat at the table, and to instill transparency and accountability at every level of county governance. I wish her success in giving every child a 21st Century education and rewarding those who teach them. I believe she can build an economy that works for all Prince Georgians. I wish her the best on this awesome responsibility. Thank you again to everyone who joined me on this journey. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing in our vision for Prince George's County. Donna
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff33/767134fb/5f46aac6/43384c2b/3860900462/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff33/767134fb/5f46aac6/43384c28/3860900462/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff33/767134fb/5f46aac6/43384c29/3860900462/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

Fort Washington, MD 20749

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina

Friend,

Since before I was even sworn in, Republicans in the legislature have been looking for ways to take power away from the office of the governor and give it to themselves without any concern for the long term consequences for the rule of law in North Carolina.

It's hard to believe, but now they want to go even further. They're trying to amend the state constitution and we can't let them get away with it.

Don't take it from me -- take this editorial from the _Charlotte Observer_ yesterday: [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a7e/2fde7c66/46883f7b/1568291f/2701354449/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180626-cooper-juneeoq18?gpsid=8_43_1667&refcode=em18_180627_eoq2_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_eoq2_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2") **We simply cannot afford a legislature that is more interested in destructive political games than actually governing our state. We have to Break the Majority.**

**[I'm counting on you to help us before our big deadline. Chip in if you can.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a7e/2fde7c66/46883f7b/15682912/2701354449/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180626-cooper-juneeoq18?gpsid=8_43_1667&refcode=em18_180627_eoq2_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_eoq2_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=7+-+Im+counting+on+you+to+help+us+before+our")**

Roy

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: everything is on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | **BREAKING: Justice Anthony Kennedy announces retirement from the Supreme Court**

* * *

Team -- This is incredibly serious.

Mitch McConnell changed the rules to steal a Supreme Court nomination from President Obama. He claimed that because it was an election year, he would need to wait until the people had spoken.

Now, with Justice Kennedy's retirement -- in another election year -- he wants to rush an appointment.

Mitch McConnell upended a bipartisan process to suit his needs. Now he wants to do it again to suit his needs.

We can't let him. All of the progress we have made is at risk.

**Women 's rights, voting rights, same-sex marriage, and a myriad of other freedoms are all on the line.**

My team and I will be working tirelessly over the coming days and weeks to prevent an ultra-conservative Supreme Court pick from taking the bench. Be sure to stay up-to-date on everything we're doing by opting into our text program.

[**Sign up for updates from my campaign team here >>>**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b9ae/43d8135f/608b1655/51009c04/2618379515/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIiwiSlNWb2IyMWxjR2h2Ym1VbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stay-updated?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Sign+up+for+updates+from+my+campaign+tea&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180627_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180627_1_1")

\-- Martin

---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b9ae/43d8135f/608b1655/51009c07/2618379515/VEsE/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180627_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180627_1_1")**

name: Thompson HQ
subject: this is important, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter -- we wanted to make sure you saw this message from our team earlier, now that our Blue Wave Membership Drive is up and running. The GOP is pouring tens of millions of dollars into key races around the country. _**[Can you pitch in to make sure we flip the House in November? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=15.00&recurring=true)**_

**Begin forwarded message:**
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true)
> | SUPPORTER RECORD #VTFB6X80ZY3 Name: Peter Willis Membership Status: PENDING _**[Suggested Activation: $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true)**_
> ---
> Peter -- we're launching our Blue Wave Membership Drive to fight back against the onslaught of attacks from deep-pocketed GOP backers.
>
> We need you on our team to get the message out to voters about Democrats who are working tirelessly to uphold our core values, a sharp contrast to the dishonest picture Republicans have been painting.
>
> _**[Can we count on you to help us bring the Blue Wave in November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true)**_
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true)
> We must ensure Democrats in targeted districts are prepared to fight back before Saturday's FEC deadline. Once fundraising totals go public, the GOP will use those numbers to plan their attack strategy for the final stretch of the race.
> _**[Help us raise $15,000 to build our Democratic front by activating your Blue Wave Membership with a donation of $5 or more now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/VyWkVzhRFurgQnxp9kU2TPXHJykb-G-0jUqmteQgUtw=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180627_2_3&amount=5.00&recurring=true)**_
>
> Thanks,
>
> Team Thompson

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uz60y6mqiWylcW3MZbzk6THkXveQdo_7LEJaX5Tt9HE=/KmUJzjK_ho3SU3OaaYpfJD-6J0nqLevgB6hlpTj4BEU=?amount=25&recurring=true)_

Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
---
Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa CA 94581 United States

name: Casey Campaign HQ
subject: Update on the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6199/51dbcc2a/48ee394/3a49dad/3112982525/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

The stakes in this election were just raised, team, and it's time to double-down.

Now that Supreme Court Justice Kennedy is retiring, it has never been more important to protect every single Democrat running for re-election. We need a Democratic majority to prevent President Trump from giving a lifetime appointment to a right-wing ideologue who could trample workers' rights, voting rights, the Affordable Care Act and our values as Americans.

This couldn't be more serious. President Trump's list of potential Supreme Court justices is full of judges who put corporations over people. The effects of giving one of those judges a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land will last for generations. So we need to stop it _now_.

With the Supreme Court on the line, we have to do everything we can to take back the Senate. Protecting Democrats like Bob Casey, running in a state that President Trump won in 2016, is more important than ever. Commit to vote and give whatever time and money you can to making sure there's a Democratic Senate to push back on any extreme nominee the president puts forward. What happens next is up to grassroots supporters like you.

Thanks,

Team Casey [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-deadline?refcode=em_20180627_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

[REGISTER TO VOTE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6199/51dbcc2a/48ee394/3a49da8/3112982525/VEsC/ "https://iwillvote.com/register/")

body:
I’ve been criss-crossing the Sixth District every week talking with Sixth District Hoosiers about how I’ll always fight for YOU alongside President Tr [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b3ab9f666874fc1967e916941697333&_e=dwm-SSd-eypmllEuaWH5ztqxrE3JYAWdFGXQLbSdVq40YDAo6JFAWVuQsw-PePKsT1hW2pdjOca_FQs-e_FP400qDwJKo3ROJHIuuWM5lvSb8b_rugb4Io85l5GjDBSuOm905np8FlKWUmAWgLvW1Yh_nHuUNqmSQTmY5H0lbS2IlIjyP1RndkP95mTFa1d26Il4ZPLVYu3bLalNrC_Jc8Ei1uN75cV7kyACI1wcsY5IC4xjygxo0XJg9pwl-xlwVpKAePE9rn5pbz416T0Sdz20LUNtNEINYBsYLd44I9PrSpAerPHZCQJqSXyk_ppNzf12nCuR95gtQ5dQJXPlBR64I5-7FLANyI2kFdthxKkf3N8LFSRz_Ffy5ew1tL-6cNFcNrvSY_3ruGPe7Q17xCrvo3tqNMAIEGiLIUzzQCI%3D) **Tuesday, November 6 is right around the corner.**
_And we’re not slowing down now._
I’ve been criss-crossing the Sixth District every week talking with Sixth District Hoosiers about how I’ll always fight for YOU alongside President Trump and Vice President Pence to Make America Great Again.
YOUR Hoosier priorities are MY priorities and while I’m busy on the campaign trail, I’m reminded of what I’m fighting for – our shared conservative values.
**[Donate any amount to help me fight for our conservative Hoosier priorities and the Trump-Pence Make America Great Again agenda>> ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b3ab9f666874fc1967e916941697333&_e=dwm-SSd-eypmllEuaWH5ztqxrE3JYAWdFGXQLbSdVq40YDAo6JFAWVuQsw-PePKsT1hW2pdjOca_FQs-e_FP400qDwJKo3ROJHIuuWM5lvSb8b_rugb4Io85l5GjDBSuOm905np8FlKWUmAWgLvW1Yh_nHuUNqmSQTmY5H0lbS2IlIjyP1RndkP95mTFa1d26Il4ZPLVYu3bLalNrC_Jc1Tc5rZoIjUS76rNxGRPHCIbGzuT2UXdrQxTCIcgz5tgebavMcfMf6VSKNXnIkQD86ipmAAfQcz8Psgs_szar-8oBn-nMJmnRFoEVR5e1IKIA-TbUBvZK5_kb8fUfl9dSxoOQp2c8dibsfWSaV5vMoNBUgEv8wYehtlz4iVJ7GRRnBjfoxpXr0mYmrerTJFpwc3CH786y2TmxzIOZk2xlUc%3D)**

But, before we close the books on what has been a busy month of campaigning, we are up against a major moment in our campaign – **the June End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline.**
This is our first quarterly deadline since our incredible May primary victory, and that’s why our campaign has set a big goal. Our goal is to raise **$25,000** and we only have 3 days to do it. **Let's Make America Great Again** User ID: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b3ab9f666874fc1967e916941697333&_e=dwm-SSd-eypmllEuaWH5ztqxrE3JYAWdFGXQLbSdVq40YDAo6JFAWVuQsw-PePKsT1hW2pdjOca_FQs-e_FP400qDwJKo3ROJHIuuWM5lvSb8b_rugb4Io85l5GjDBSuOm905np8FlKWUmAWgLvW1Yh_nHuUNqmSQTmY5H0lbS2IlIjyP1RndkP95mTFa1d26Il4ZPLVYu3bLalNrC_Jc-T1iVtVGns4dr0fJWQ5Q82EU1PAg4oAuwnT3pEKnHYQQ3XxU0eOJMQJZI4t3je2SXwvOeRnEb-yWPEPSnr5hbQHh1Jm2uWbqS2F_r4fGoh1q_16J3xvXcH7oLaneiFS0M2yJthE-1Qo2jg5QNArB7bpC98v-owIoph6xcA2CNaB4OpRf-wSDcTJl0k83tV0_EWegKLA5HwS3N8GkXyiHEk%3D)****Goal: $25,000
** [ **Donate $12** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b3ab9f666874fc1967e916941697333&_e=dwm-SSd-eypmllEuaWH5ztqxrE3JYAWdFGXQLbSdVq40YDAo6JFAWVuQsw-PePKsBEzhePQn0Pt8Imf8TPgkgt8DFuflDfaku5ys2vZdkRZA3_kwWGx0kJuwBdKhUAIZ2n93d2UkRouwXcfUuMidWYvo5wqhZlDzYzYjJ499_GRGw-lSEXgZwLNa5QluFbdmaMzoQVpY3L8OWxnvNI4V_DRakDqTLHvLAMe4SkDsGp02rQC_OG9ImED5AffDeg3wfTmXUmtQoT5fdh-KQlnFodrl3Ki1KbjgdLX2C9O7cg6nf8bBJvSYyuq7QwmDUP8Z9QhKzTTsrkkvHDDzp_f--wn4Uzd6z9JogG2dTxT_pepUC3j4_Mqn6aJOLDJPJclEJXGtKKrtEa1gnScQO5c26aC_d4q72BGU7HLpl5WwnLnO6j6nfMX4UfnjqRXw3jRF) It doesn’t matter how big a task is – a Marine’s mission is to succeed. Failure is not an option.
No one said it would be easy, but I’m up for this challenge. Are you?
**[Stand with me for our conservative Hoosier values and keep our momentum surging by donating any amount>> ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5b3ab9f666874fc1967e916941697333&_e=dwm-SSd-eypmllEuaWH5ztqxrE3JYAWdFGXQLbSdVq40YDAo6JFAWVuQsw-PePKsT1hW2pdjOca_FQs-e_FP400qDwJKo3ROJHIuuWM5lvSb8b_rugb4Io85l5GjDBSuOm905np8FlKWUmAWgLvW1Yh_nHuUNqmSQTmY5H0lbS2IlIjyP1RndkP95mTFa1d26Il4ZPLVYu3bLalNrC_Jc79BhoTyq8O37btY-69IPDW4OvpmN4UvNTRnkNsWxbdjGXvpHXcaj47gWTxycTnWWTYkrwqhJ2auGLr98fh0QOmg_jvJ_H0rIkYzDUNyw_tpSUigqZ6g651BOaZbGv_kSt_sPT5Hh0CifsgeKOU3bQQxtIotT0Abz9e0BODvP1Ix0TehL1_TE6I-_HnfxS9c1MTud8olTZZy0eVzdezS35U%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!Greg Pence

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: [Supreme Court] Flipping the Senate has never been more critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4154/24c69fd9/1959ef916/1883e14a/1178623129/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER85N_digital_email_20180627_KennedyRR_inact&source=WQEFER85N_digital_email_20180627_KennedyRR_inact")
---

Peter,

Today, we received some devastating news from the Supreme Court:

Justice Anthony Kennedy is retiring, giving Donald Trump the opportunity to nominate another anti-choice Supreme Court justice.

The stakes could not be higher. This individual will have the power to repeal _Roe v. Wade_ -- endangering the lives of tens of millions of American women, jeopardizing our health care, and undermining our rights.

We've endorsed two women, **Jacky Rosen** (NV) and **Kyrsten Sinema** (AZ), who can flip the two seats we need to take back the Senate and give Democrats approval over Trump's nominees. We have to win.

**Donate $3 now to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the Senate and defend the right to choose:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Our-Rights](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4154/24c69fd9/1959ef916/1883e14b/1178623129/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180627_email_KennedyRR?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectOurRights&utm_campaign=WQEFER85N_digital_email_20180627_KennedyRR_inact&source=WQEFER85N_digital_email_20180627_KennedyRR_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List
